http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#Checksum.description: A Checksum is value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated. Even small changes to the content of the file will change its checksum. This class allows the results of a variety of checksum and cryptographic message digest algorithms to be represented.

http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#algorithm.description: Identifies the algorithm used to produce the subject Checksum. Currently, SHA-1 is the only supported algorithm. It is anticipated that other algorithms will be supported at a later time.

http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#checksumValue.description: The checksumValue property provides a lower case hexidecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.label: License Document
http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.label: Type
http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/Agent.label: Agent
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/Agent.description: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Catalog.label: Catalog
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Catalog.description: A curated collection of metadata about resources (e.g., datasets and data services in the context of a data catalog).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.label: Dataset
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.description: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#pref.label: preferred label
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#pref.description: A resource has no more than one value of skos:prefLabel per language tag, and no more than one value of skos:prefLabel without language tag.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.label: Format
http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.description: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#status.label: status
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#status.description: Links to the status of the Asset or Asset Distribution in the context of a particular workflow process. Since Status is defined using a skos:Concept, that is the defined range for this property.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.label: Distribution
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.description: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.label: Title
http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accrualPeriodic.label: Accrual Periodicity
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accrualPeriodic.description: The frequency with which items are added to a collection.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.label: Publisher
http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.description: An entity responsible for making the resource available.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.label: is in scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.label: Dataset
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.description: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#theme.label: theme
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#theme.description: A main category of the resource. A resource can have multiple themes.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept Scheme
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#nota.label: notation
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#nota.description: A notation, also known as classification code, is a string of characters such as "T58.5" or "303.4833" used to uniquely identify a concept within the scope of a given concept scheme.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#Identifier.label: Identifier
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#Identifier.description: This class is based on the UN/CEFACT Identifier complex type defined in See Section 5.8 of Core Components Data Type Catalogue Version 3.1 (http://www.unece.org/fileadmin/DAM/cefact/codesfortrade/CCTS/CCTS-DTCatalogueVersion3p1.pdf) In RDF this is expressed using the following properties: - the content string should be provided using skos:notation, datatyped with the identifier scheme (inclduing the version number if appropriate); - use dcterms:creator to link to a class describing the agency that manages the identifier scheme or adms:schemaAgency to provide the name as a literal. Although not part of the ADMS conceptual model, it may be useful to provide further properties to the Identifier class such as dcterms:created to provide the date on which the identifier was issued.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/hasPart.label: Has Part
http://purl.org/dc/terms/hasPart.description: A related resource that is included either physically or logically in the described resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/isPartOf.label: Is Part Of
http://purl.org/dc/terms/isPartOf.description: A related resource in which the described resource is physically or logically included.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.label: Date Issued
http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.description: Date of formal issuance of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.label: License
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.label: Date Modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.label: Publisher
http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.description: An entity responsible for making the resource available.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.label: Rights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.description: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.label: Title
http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#dataset.label: dataset
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#dataset.description: A dataset that is listed in the catalog.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#record.label: record
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#record.description: A record describing the registration of a single dataset or data service that is part of the catalog.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#themeTaxonomy.label: theme taxonomy
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#themeTaxonomy.description: The knowledge organization system (KOS) used to classify catalog's datasets.

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/homepage.label: homepage
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/homepage.description: This axiom needed so that Protege loads DCAT 3 without errors.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.label: License Document
http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.label: Rights Statement
http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.description: A statement about the intellectual property rights (IPR) held in or over a resource, a legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource, or a statement about access rights.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Catalog.label: Catalog
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Catalog.description: A curated collection of metadata about resources (e.g., datasets and data services in the context of a data catalog).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#CatalogRecord.label: Catalog Record
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#CatalogRecord.description: A record in a data catalog, describing the registration of a single dataset or data service.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.label: Dataset
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.description: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/conformsTo.description: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.description: Date of formal issuance of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/source.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#status.description: Links to the status of the Asset or Asset Distribution in the context of a particular workflow process. Since Status is defined using a skos:Concept, that is the defined range for this property.

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/primaryTopic.description: This axiom needed so that Protege loads DCAT 3 without errors.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/LinguisticSyste.label: Linguistic System
http://purl.org/dc/terms/LinguisticSyste.description: A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/Standard.description: A reference point against which other things can be evaluated or compared.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/Agent.description: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.description: An entity responsible for making the resource available.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#inSc.description: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Catalog.description: A curated collection of metadata about resources (e.g., datasets and data services in the context of a data catalog).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#themeTaxonomy.description: The knowledge organization system (KOS) used to classify catalog's datasets.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.description: Date of formal issuance of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.label: License
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.label: Date Modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.label: Rights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.description: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.label: Title
http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#checksum.description: The checksum property provides a mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a File or Package have not changed.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#status.label: status
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#status.description: Links to the status of the Asset or Asset Distribution in the context of a particular workflow process. Since Status is defined using a skos:Concept, that is the defined range for this property.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.label: Distribution
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.description: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#accessURL.label: access address
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#accessURL.description: A URL of a resource that gives access to a distribution of the dataset. E.g. landing page, feed, SPARQL endpoint. Use for all cases except a simple download link, in which case downloadURL is preferred.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#byteSize.label: byte size
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#byteSize.description: The size of a distribution in bytes.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#downloadURL.label: download URL
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#downloadURL.description: The URL of the downloadable file in a given format. E.g. CSV file or RDF file. The format is indicated by the distribution's dcterms:format and/or dcat:mediaType.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#mediaType.label: media type
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#mediaType.description: The media type of the distribution as defined by IANA

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/page.label: page
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/page.description: A page or document about this thing.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.label: License Document
http://purl.org/dc/terms/LicenseDocument.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/LinguisticSyste.label: Linguistic System
http://purl.org/dc/terms/LinguisticSyste.description: A system of signs, symbols, sounds, gestures, or rules used in communication.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.label: Rights Statement
http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.description: A statement about the intellectual property rights (IPR) held in or over a resource, a legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource, or a statement about access rights.

http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#Checksum.description: A Checksum is value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated. Even small changes to the content of the file will change its checksum. This class allows the results of a variety of checksum and cryptographic message digest algorithms to be represented.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.label: Access Rights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.description: Information about who access the resource or an indication of its security status.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accrualPeriodic.label: Accrual Periodicity
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accrualPeriodic.description: The frequency with which items are added to a collection.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/conformsTo.label: Conforms To
http://purl.org/dc/terms/conformsTo.description: An established standard to which the described resource conforms.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/hasVersion.label: Has Version
http://purl.org/dc/terms/hasVersion.description: A related resource that is a version, edition, or adaptation of the described resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/isVersionOf.label: Is Version Of
http://purl.org/dc/terms/isVersionOf.description: A related resource of which the described resource is a version, edition, or adaptation.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.label: Date Issued
http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued.description: Date of formal issuance of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.label: Date Modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/provenance.label: Provenance
http://purl.org/dc/terms/provenance.description: A statement of any changes in ownership and custody of the resource since its creation that are significant for its authenticity, integrity, and interpretation.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.label: Publisher
http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher.description: An entity responsible for making the resource available.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/source.label: Source
http://purl.org/dc/terms/source.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.label: Title
http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.label: Type
http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#identifier.label: identifier
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#identifier.description: adms:identifier is used to link any resource to an instance of adms:Identifier which is its range. N.B. it is not appropriate to use dcterms:identifer to link to the Identifier class as its range is rdfs:Literal. ADMS uses this to provide any identifier for the Asset.

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#sample.label: sample
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#sample.description: Links to a sample of an Asset (which is itself an Asset).

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#contactPoint.label: contact point
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#contactPoint.description: Relevant contact information for the catalogued resource. Use of vCard is recommended.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#distribution.label: distribution
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#distribution.description: An available distribution of the dataset.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#landingPage.label: landing page
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#landingPage.description: A Web page that can be navigated to in a Web browser to gain access to the catalog, a dataset, its distributions and/or additional information.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#theme.label: theme
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#theme.description: A main category of the resource. A resource can have multiple themes.

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/page.label: page
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/page.description: A page or document about this thing.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/Frequency.label: Frequency
http://purl.org/dc/terms/Frequency.description: A rate at which something recurs.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/Location.label: Location
http://purl.org/dc/terms/Location.description: A spatial region or named place.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/PeriodOfTime.label: Period of Time
http://purl.org/dc/terms/PeriodOfTime.description: An interval of time that is named or defined by its start and end dates.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/ProvenanceState.label: Provenance Statement
http://purl.org/dc/terms/ProvenanceState.description: Any changes in ownership and custody of a resource since its creation that are significant for its authenticity, integrity, and interpretation.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.label: Rights Statement
http://purl.org/dc/terms/RightsStatement.description: A statement about the intellectual property rights (IPR) held in or over a resource, a legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource, or a statement about access rights.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/Standard.label: Standard
http://purl.org/dc/terms/Standard.description: A reference point against which other things can be evaluated or compared.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.label: Concept
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Conc.description: An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#Kind.label: Kind
http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#Kind.description: The parent class for all objects

http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#Identifier.label: Identifier
http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#Identifier.description: This class is based on the UN/CEFACT Identifier complex type defined in See Section 5.8 of Core Components Data Type Catalogue Version 3.1 (http://www.unece.org/fileadmin/DAM/cefact/codesfortrade/CCTS/CCTS-DTCatalogueVersion3p1.pdf) In RDF this is expressed using the following properties: - the content string should be provided using skos:notation, datatyped with the identifier scheme (inclduing the version number if appropriate); - use dcterms:creator to link to a class describing the agency that manages the identifier scheme or adms:schemaAgency to provide the name as a literal. Although not part of the ADMS conceptual model, it may be useful to provide further properties to the Identifier class such as dcterms:created to provide the date on which the identifier was issued.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.label: Dataset
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset.description: A collection of data, published or curated by a single source, and available for access or download in one or more representations.

http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.label: Distribution
http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Distribution.description: A specific representation of a dataset. A dataset might be available in multiple serializations that may differ in various ways, including natural language, media-type or format, schematic organization, temporal and spatial resolution, level of detail or profiles (which might specify any or all of the above).

http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/Agent.label: Agent
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/Agent.description: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).
